message:
fix(membrane): upgrade TLS cache epoch atomics to Acquire/Release ordering

Strengthen memory ordering on the global TLS cache epoch counter from
Relaxed to Acquire/Release to ensure proper happens-before guarantees:

- current_epoch() now uses Ordering::Acquire so reading threads see all
  state changes (e.g. slot quarantine marks) that occurred before the
  epoch was bumped
- bump_tls_cache_epoch() now uses Ordering::Release to establish the
  happens-before edge, ensuring prior writes to shared state are visible
  to any thread that subsequently reads the new epoch value

This fixes a subtle correctness issue where a thread could observe a
bumped epoch but still see stale pre-bump state due to Relaxed ordering
not providing cross-thread visibility guarantees.

Also updates beads issue tracking metadata.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"bd-282v","title":"Metrics: production observability dashboard","description":"Runtime metrics dashboard for monitoring FrankenLibC.

Goal: Observability for FrankenLibC in production.

Metrics Categories:

1. Validation Metrics
   - validations_total (counter)
   - validations_by_outcome (Valid, Foreign, Null, etc.)
   - validation_latency_ns (histogram)

2. Healing Metrics
   - heals_total (counter)
   - heals_by_action (ClampSize, IgnoreDoubleFree, etc.)
   - heals_by_api_family

3. Allocator Metrics
   - allocations_total
   - bytes_allocated
   - quarantine_depth
   - arena_utilization

4. Cache Metrics
   - tls_cache_hits
   - tls_cache_misses
   - bloom_filter_checks
   - bloom_false_positives

5. Runtime Math Metrics
   - risk_upper_bound_ppm (gauge)
   - bandit_profile_selections
   - controller_decisions

Export Formats:
- JSONL to file (default)
- Prometheus exposition format (optional)
- StatsD (optional)

Dashboard:
- Grafana dashboard template
- Key performance indicators
- Alerting rules

Success Criteria:
- All metric categories exported
- Dashboard shows real-time state
- Alerting for anomalies

## Acceptance Criteria
See `acceptance_criteria` field.","acceptance_criteria":"## Acceptance Criteria
Implementation must preserve all existing functionality and claims while adding deterministic verification coverage.

### Mandatory Verification Gate
- Comprehensive unit tests are required for all touched logic: positive, negative, adversarial, and regression.
- Deterministic e2e scripts are required for all externally visible behavior in strict and hardened mode where relevant.
- Structured logs are mandatory for unit/e2e runs with fields: `trace_id`, `mode`, `api_family`, `symbol`, `decision_path`, `healing_action`, `errno`, `latency_ns`, `artifact_refs`.
- Closure evidence must include exact test commands, expected outputs/thresholds, and representative failure signatures.
- CI must persist logs, diffs, and reports with deterministic naming and retention for replay/triage.
- Tooling contract: deterministic orchestration/traceability uses `/dp/asupersync`, and deterministic diff/snapshot/TUI evidence uses `/dp/frankentui`.","notes":"### Mandatory Test/E2E Logging Checklist
- Test command set is documented in bead notes before closure (unit + e2e + perf where applicable).
- Expected output and pass/fail thresholds are documented per command.
- Failure triage snippets are documented (top failure classes + where to inspect artifacts).
- Evidence index entry links logs, parity diffs, and benchmark/proof artifacts.
- Overload behavior logging is required when applicable: pressure signal, degradation mode, selected policy, guard decision, rollback trigger.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-12T15:04:13.620640155Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T23:07:31.559656162Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["metrics","observability"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-282v","depends_on_id":"bd-2vv","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:29Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-284","title":"RaptorQ Runtime: Adaptive redundancy tuning (e-process + evidence ledger)","description":"Add an anytime-valid monitor that tunes evidence redundancy.

Approach (pattern from FrankenSQLite):
- Maintain e-process on symbol survival/corruption events.
- If erasure rate exceeds budget, increase overhead_percent.
- If far below budget for sustained period, MAY decrease, but only under conservative loss matrix.
- Emit evidence ledger for every change.

Acceptance criteria:
- Deterministic tuning logic (fixed-point).
- No changes without ledger.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-09T21:34:56.227782097Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-11T03:03:00.611097237Z","closed_at":"2026-02-11T03:03:00.517447018Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-284","depends_on_id":"bd-1es","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:29Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":734,"issue_id":"bd-284","author":"Codex","text":"Validation pass completed in current workspace state: (1) cargo fmt/check/clippy/test + abi release build all pass via scripts/ci.sh, (2) runtime_math snapshot golden + sha256 were regenerated to include redundancy_tuner snapshot fields, (3) AGENTS.md module inventory now includes runtime_math/redundancy_tuner.rs to remove inventory drift gate failure. No destructive ops performed. Next technical follow-up for bd-284: decide whether redundancy_tuner should be observe-wired (currently cadence-updated in decide, wiring script reports MISSING_OBSERVE as non-blocking).","created_at":"2026-02-11T03:00:26Z"},{"id":735,"issue_id":"bd-284","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"DONE by CobaltCompass. Implemented redundancy_tuner.rs: adaptive redundancy controller with e-process sequential test, EWMA loss rate tracking, and audit ledger. Fixed-point arithmetic only. 4 states: Calibrating/Nominal/Stressed/Critical. 10 unit tests. Wired into RuntimeMathKernel: cadence-gated at 4096 calls, severity slot 63, snapshot exports overhead_ppm/loss_rate_ppm/state/adjustments. AGENTS.md updated (69 modules). All 822 membrane tests pass, all quality gates green.","created_at":"2026-02-11T03:03:00Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-28s","title":"Guard: automated drift check (support matrix vs code + harness)","description":"Critique mapping: #1 and #2.

Deliverables:
- Add a harness test that:
  - regenerates exported symbol list
  - verifies every symbol is present in the support matrix
  - verifies docs reference the same counts

Acceptance:
- CI fails if docs drift or if new symbols are added without classification.

Evidence & Test Requirements:
- Add comprehensive unit tests (happy-path, negative, adversarial, and regression cases) for all changed logic.
- Add or update deterministic e2e scripts that exercise strict and hardened modes where relevant.
- Emit structured detailed logs for test/e2e runs (trace_id, mode, API/symbol, outcome, errno, timing, and artifact refs).
- Bead cannot close until test commands and log artifact locations are documented.","notes":"2026-02-11 closure (CrimsonCove): All deliverables verified: (1) symbol_drift_test.rs regenerates symbol list, verifies every symbol in matrix, verifies source fns have matrix entries; (2) parity_report_drift_test.rs verifies docs reference same counts; (3) check_symbol_drift.sh CI gate fails on drift. 8 tests pass.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"CrimsonCove","created_at":"2026-02-11T02:37:46.386592721Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-11T16:51:23.568429Z","closed_at":"2026-02-11T16:51:23.568429Z","close_reason":"Automated drift guard fully operational. symbol_drift_test (6 pass): verifies symbols exist in source/matrix, no duplicates, valid statuses/modules. parity_report_drift_test (2 pass): verifies docs and support matrix alignment. scripts/check_symbol_drift.sh gate in CI.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ci","critique","docs"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-28s","depends_on_id":"bd-4rl","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:29Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

 {"id":"bd-29b","title":"Docs/Runtime config truth pass: env knob semantics + drift gate","description":"Background:
- Runtime behavior and public docs must remain synchronized; stale env-var docs or semantics claims create operational risk and erode trust.
- Current readout indicates potential mismatch between documented runtime env knobs and actively implemented env controls.

Goal:
- Make runtime configuration docs and implementation provably consistent at all times.

Deliverables:
1) Enumerate all runtime environment variables used in code paths.
2) Enumerate all runtime environment variables documented in README/feature docs.
3) Resolve mismatches by either:
   - implementing missing knobs, or
   - removing/documenting deprecation with migration notes.
4) Add automated drift gate for env-var docs ↔ code consistency.

Acceptance Criteria:
- No undocumented active runtime knobs.
- No documented knobs without implementation (unless explicitly marked planned/deprecated and gated).
- Drift gate fails on any future mismatch.

Test and Logging Requirements:
- Unit tests for env parser behavior and mode immutability assumptions.
- E2E tests that exercise documented knobs and verify expected runtime effects.
- Structured logs for each env-case test: trace_id, env_set, resolved_mode/config, outcome, timing, artifact_refs.

Alien-artifact Rigor Requirements:
- Maintain explicit safety-mode invariants and monotonic semantics in docs and tests (strict/hardened contracts cannot be ambiguous).","notes":"Progress update (codex, 2026-02-13): closed bd-29b.1 and bd-29b.2. Artifacts: tests/conformance/runtime_env_inventory.v1.json, tests/conformance/docs_env_inventory.v1.json, tests/conformance/env_docs_code_mismatch_report.v1.json. Current mismatch summary: missing_in_docs=15, missing_in_code=3 (FRANKENLIBC_DISABLE_HEAL, FRANKENLIBC_LOG, FRANKENLIBC_TLS_CACHE), semantic_drift=0. Next blocker: bd-29b.3 reconciliation + CI drift gate.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"epic","assignee":"AmberStone","created_at":"2026-02-12T14:59:34.246793510Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T09:25:51.612586291Z","closed_at":"2026-02-13T09:25:51.612553079Z","close_reason":"Env docs/runtime reconciliation complete; drift gate + harness verification passing with regenerated docs inventory.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["config","critique","docs","verification"],"comments":[{"id":736,"issue_id":"bd-29b","author":"AmberStone","text":"Closure audit (AmberStone, 2026-02-13): validated env docs/runtime reconciliation artifacts and drift gate.\n\nInitial run exposed a real stale-artifact mismatch:\n- PASS: docs env inventory + mismatch report are up-to-date (classifications=0)
PASS: docs/code mismatch report reconciled (total=0, missing_in_docs=0, missing_in_code=0, semantic_drift=0) failed with .\n\nRemediation executed:\n- Wrote docs env artifacts: tests/conformance/docs_env_inventory.v1.json and tests/conformance/env_docs_code_mismatch_report.v1.json\n  -> regenerated docs inventory/report to current README line anchors.\n\nPost-remediation verification (all PASS):\n1) PASS: docs env inventory + mismatch report are up-to-date (classifications=0)
PASS: docs/code mismatch report reconciled (total=0, missing_in_docs=0, missing_in_code=0, semantic_drift=0)\n2) 
running 6 tests
test gate_script_exists_and_is_executable ... ok
test unresolved_ambiguous_is_empty ... ok
test mismatch_summary_counts_are_zero ... ok
test mismatch_report_is_fully_classified ... ok
test docs_inventory_exists_and_has_expected_shape ... ok
test gate_script_passes ... ok

test result: ok. 6 passed; 0 failed; 0 ignored; 0 measured; 0 filtered out; finished in 0.07s\n\nResult: summary counts remain fully reconciled (, , ), unresolved ambiguous list empty.","created_at":"2026-02-13T09:25:37Z"},{"id":737,"issue_id":"bd-29b","author":"AmberStone","text":"Closure audit (AmberStone, 2026-02-13): validated env docs/runtime reconciliation artifacts and drift gate.

Initial run exposed a real stale-artifact mismatch:
- `bash scripts/check_docs_env_mismatch.sh` failed with drift detected for `tests/conformance/docs_env_inventory.v1.json`.

Remediation executed:
- `python3 scripts/generate_docs_env_mismatch_report.py --root /data/projects/frankenlibc`
  -> regenerated docs inventory/report to current README line anchors.

Post-remediation verification (all PASS):
1. `bash scripts/check_docs_env_mismatch.sh`
2. `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/cargo-target-codex-harness cargo test -p frankenlibc-harness --test docs_env_mismatch_test`

Result: summary counts remain fully reconciled (`missing_in_docs=0`, `missing_in_code=0`, `semantic_drift=0`) and `unresolved_ambiguous` is empty.
","created_at":"2026-02-13T09:25:49Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-29b.1","title":"Runtime env-knob inventory from code with semantic metadata","description":"Background:
- Runtime env knobs are safety-critical and must be fully discoverable.

Scope:
- Enumerate all env variables read by runtime code paths (membrane/core/abi/harness where relevant).
- Capture semantics, default values, parse rules, mutability rules, and safety impact.

Deliverables:
1) Machine-readable env inventory generated from code.
2) Semantic metadata table (default/range/mode impact).
3) Unknown/ambiguous knob report.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Inventory generation is reproducible.
- Every active knob has explicit semantics and ownership.

Rationale:
- Establishes code truth before docs reconciliation.

Testing/Logging:
- Unit tests for env inventory extractor and parser behavior.
- E2E tests that exercise each knob at least once.
- Logs: trace_id, env_key, parsed_value, effective_config, source_location.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"codex","created_at":"2026-02-12T15:03:13.693258608Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T01:54:50.589550755Z","closed_at":"2026-02-13T01:54:50.589528093Z","close_reason":"Implemented deterministic runtime env inventory generator, semantic metadata table, unknown/ambiguous report, gate script, and harness test.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["config","docs","runtime"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-29b.1","depends_on_id":"bd-29b","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:29Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-29b.2","title":"Docs env-knob inventory + code↔docs mismatch classification","description":"Background:
- Documentation truth must be compared against code truth, not edited ad-hoc.

Scope:
- Enumerate all documented runtime knobs across README/feature docs.
- Diff docs inventory against code inventory and classify mismatch types.

Deliverables:
1) Docs inventory generator.
2) Mismatch classification report (missing-in-docs, missing-in-code, semantic-drift).
3) Remediation plan (implement, deprecate, or clarify).

Acceptance Criteria:
- All mismatches are classified and assigned a remediation action.
- No ambiguous unresolved mismatch remains.

Rationale:
- Prevents operator confusion and incorrect production assumptions.

Testing/Logging:
- Unit tests for doc parser/extractor.
- E2E test running inventory diff pipeline.
- Logs: trace_id, env_key, mismatch_class, remediation_action.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"codex","created_at":"2026-02-12T15:03:13.801734085Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T01:57:06.218225017Z","closed_at":"2026-02-13T01:57:06.218195592Z","close_reason":"Implemented docs env-key inventory generator, docs↔code mismatch classifier report with remediation actions, gate script, and harness tests.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["audit","config","docs"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-29b.2","depends_on_id":"bd-29b","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:29Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-29b.2","depends_on_id":"bd-29b.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:29Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
